title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Little Jack Jingle,
                He used to live single:
        But when he got tired of this kind of life,
        He left off being single, and liv'd with his wife.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLI. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
